name: resly-open-api
description: Codex companion plugin for operating the Resly Open API demo CLI safely.

interface.shortDescription: Use the Resly CLI for API discovery, diagnostics, and safe previews.
interface.longDescription: A Codex companion for the Resly Open API demo CLI. It guides agents through fixture-backed reads, live authentication checks, reservation and pricing discovery, dry-run webhook setup, and explicit-only write flows.
